channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Einstein's wormhole may actually be a hidden mirror of time
item.description: New research suggests the Einstein-Rosen bridge might not be a tunnel but a reflection of time itself.

item.title: Cancer-causing chemicals found in common foods, study warns
item.description: Scientists have detected potentially carcinogenic chemicals in many everyday foods, especially those cooked at high temperatures.

item.title: Podcast: Onboard autonomous IndyCar racing (part 2)
item.description: Madhur Behl, an NSF-supported associate professor, discusses software challenges in autonomous racing and how his program aids AI development.

item.title: Scientists warn that current vitamin B12 guidelines may be putting your brain at risk
item.description: Getting enough vitamin B12 to meet current health guidelines may not be sufficient to protect the aging brain. Researchers at UC San Francisco found...
